expected_scenarios.scenario_a: Claire replied YES to nudge. Action: Confirm CONVERTED. Log £350 (Option B) in CRM. Write CHANGELOG.md — first revenue conversion. Confirm delivery timeline: 3-4 working days. Send invoice if agreed.
expected_scenarios.scenario_b: Claire replied with questions. Action: Answer clearly and concisely. Confirm Fresha is free for the salon. Do not over-explain.
expected_scenarios.scenario_c: Claire replied NO. Action: Mark lead 3 LOST. Log in CRM. Graceful close: 'Thanks for letting me know, Claire — good luck with the season ahead.'
expected_scenarios.scenario_d: No reply to nudge (sent ~2026-04-10). Action: Send one final close — 'Claire — happy to leave this with you. If the timing changes, you know where I am.' Then mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE. Do NOT send another proposal or pricing mention.

imap_check_priority_2026_04_22.note: It has been 9 days since the proposal nudge. The deal window is extremely narrow now. One clean close or mark as lost.
